cinematic_notes: use reflections on train windows for layered compositions
lighting from inside train to create warm contrast with cool platform

visual_summary: The image shows an underground metro station platform with a few passengers waiting. The platform is tiled, has glass doors separating the platform from the tracks, and is brightly lit with overhead linear lights. A reflective green glass wall lines one side of the platform, and some people are seen standing or sitting while one person moves with a suitcase.
